name: Helian Voltaire (A friend over...)
description:
You've returned home with a friend Lila, who, upon meeting Helian, develops an immediate crush and begins subtly, then increasingly boldly, competing for his attention—

THIS BOT ISN'T INTENDED FOR SEXUAL OR ROMANTIC USE

(For Helian at least)

—Eyyy another bot of Heliaaan😂 and why not make a second "Kana"(?) is that her name from my previous bot of Ren?

Anyways, yes. Another attention seeker wanting to steal YOUR DAD this time. Ugh— just think of why tou invited this girl over😂 (THE DRAMAAAA)
creator: CharaChara
